site.name: Elchai Group

/.title: Elchai Group | AI & Blockchain Development Company Dubai
/.description: Elchai Group builds AI, blockchain, and Web3 solutions from Dubai. We develop products like Tarality crypto exchange, BB-Estate tokenized real estate, and Blyncc smart payments.
/.h1: AI & Blockchain Development Company in Dubai

/about.title: About Elchai Group | Our Story, Team & Mission
/about.description: Learn about Elchai Group — founded in Dubai, partnered with Rob Rockefeller SC, building AI and blockchain products that solve real problems across finance, real estate, and digital identity.

/services.title: AI & Blockchain Development Services | Elchai Group
/services.description: Full-stack AI, blockchain, smart contract, DeFi, and Web3 development services. From custom AI agents to tokenization platforms — built by Elchai Group in Dubai.

/services/ai-development.title: AI Development Services Dubai | Custom AI Solutions | Elchai Group
/services/ai-development.description: Custom AI application development — chatbots, AI agents, automation, NLP, and computer vision solutions. Built by Elchai Group for businesses in Dubai and globally.

/services/blockchain-development.title: Blockchain Development Services Dubai | Smart Contracts & DeFi | Elchai Group
/services/blockchain-development.description: End-to-end blockchain development — smart contracts, DeFi protocols, token creation, and decentralized apps. Elchai Group delivers production-ready blockchain solutions.

/services/web3-development.title: Web3 Development Company UAE | dApps & Decentralized Solutions | Elchai Group
/services/web3-development.description: Web3 development from concept to launch — dApps, DAOs, NFT platforms, and decentralized infrastructure. Elchai Group is a leading Web3 development company in the UAE.

/services/smart-contracts.title: Smart Contract Development & Auditing | Elchai Group Dubai
/services/smart-contracts.description: Secure smart contract development, auditing, and deployment on Ethereum, Solana, and custom chains. Built and battle-tested by Elchai Group.

/services/defi-development.title: DeFi Development Company | DEX, Lending & Yield Platforms | Elchai Group
/services/defi-development.description: Custom DeFi protocol development — decentralized exchanges, lending platforms, yield farming, and liquidity solutions. Elchai Group builds DeFi that works.

/services/mobile-app-development.title: Mobile App Development Dubai | iOS & Android | Elchai Group

/services/metaverse-development.title: Metaverse Development Dubai | Virtual Worlds & 3D Experiences | Elchai Group

/services/tokenization.title: Asset Tokenization Platform Development | Real Estate & Securities | Elchai Group
/services/tokenization.description: Build tokenization platforms for real estate, securities, and real-world assets. Elchai Group developed BB-Estate — we know tokenization from the inside.

/products.title: Our Products | Tarality, BB-Estate, Blyncc & More | Elchai Group

/products/blyncc.title: Blyncc | Smart Payment Solutions by Elchai Group
